--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Effective as of yesterday, ASW was issued 754 shares
of LTD as part of her
director and committee member comp. According to
Howard, this issuance and
the exercise yesterday of LHW's options will have to
be reported on a Form 4 to
be filed by tomorrow.

Darren
